---
title: "“The difficulty of obtaining places for our younger members. By Miss Yonge.” The Girls’ Friendly Society. Sixth Winchester Diocesan Meeting."
---

## “The difficulty of obtaining places for our younger members. By Miss Yonge.” The Girls’ Friendly Society. Sixth Winchester Diocesan Meeting.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** paper in conference proceedings

**Publisher:** Winchester: Warren & Son. October 1882: 29-31

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
